summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SP630E RGBWW LED Controller Phase 5 features - Aquarium day simulation and improved scheduler. All backend APIs working perfectly (10/10). Frontend demo mode and all 6 tabs functional. Aquarium simulation with 6 day phases, moonlight mode, and customizable transitions working correctly. Schedule creation with start/end times and color selection operational. Control panel instant slider commands working without send button.
passed_tests: Preset CRUD operations (create, list, toggle favorite, delete)
Schedule CRUD operations (create, list, toggle enabled, delete)
6 tabs navigation (control, aquarium, presets, schedule, animation, settings)
AY IŞIĞI toggle and moonlight sliders (blue, cool white)
FAZ RENKLERİ section with 5 phase editors (sunrise, morning, noon, afternoon, sunset)
Phase color editing with 5 channel sliders (R, G, B, WW, CW)
Schedule creation form (name, start/end time, days selection, color sliders)
Control panel 5 sliders with instant commands (no send button)
